text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Her movements have gotten<n>even more
refined—and she's built up<n>more stamina as well!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
You can tell how hard she's been<n>working. I can't
wait to showcase her<n>talent on stage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello seems to be moved and<n>inspired after
watching<n><chrname> train.
